worst_messages.speaker: agent
worst_messages.text: Okay, I understand you need some time to consider the options. Would it be alright if I checked in with you in about a week? Also, just a reminder that every month the loan remains open, it adds a negative entry to your credit report. The offer for penalty removal will still be open when we next speak. Please save my number and feel free to call whenever you're ready.

worst_messages.text: Okay, give me just a moment... Okay, Ravi Gupta, to help me understand better, could you tell me a little bit about what's making it difficult to pay the fifty-five thousand rupees for your DemoLender loan right now?
